title: Apply for a reasonable costs order: Form Leasehold 10
body: "There are 4 types of applications that can be made with this form. You can use this form to make an application under either:   section 33(1) of the Leasehold Reform, Housing and Urban Development Act 1993 section 60(1) of the Leasehold Reform, Housing and Urban Development Act 1993 section 91(2)(d) of the Leasehold Reform, Housing and Urban Development Act 1993 section 21(1)(ba) and 21(2) of the Leasehold Reform Act 1967   Read guidance on what happens at the First-tier Tribunal in a dispute on leasehold enfranchisement.  Read guidance on the costs, fees and expenses you can recover from the residential property tribunal.  You can get free government funded, independent advice from LEASE, the Leasehold Advisory Service.  Open a document  You can download and open PDF documents on your device. Downloading enables more features to be used, such as printing.  Adobe Reader is a free to use PDF viewer. You can use this to view, fill in and print PDF documents. You do not need to sign up for a free trial.  Follow these steps:    Download Adobe Reader for free. Right-click on the document link then select ‘Save link as’ or ‘Download linked file’. Save the form (in your ‘documents’ folder, for example). Open Adobe Reader and then select the saved form.   If the form still does not open, contact hmctsforms@justice.gov.uk.  If you need a printed version contact your local court.  Find more court and tribunal forms by category.  Find out how HM Courts & Tribunals Service uses personal information you give when you fill in a form. "
